changeSet.author: discussion
changeSet.sql: CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

changeSet.author: discussion
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp.tbl_notice_by_id (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, story_id bigint, content text);

changeSet.author: discussion
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp.tbl_notice_by_story (story_id bigint, id bigint, content text, PRIMARY KEY ((story_id), id)) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (id ASC);

changeSet.author: discussion
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE distcomp.tbl_notice_by_id ADD state text;

changeSet.author: discussion
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE distcomp.tbl_notice_by_story ADD state text;
